text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text:
Hell yeah! Let's get steppin', you two! We're off to that Uma Lord's
castle!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but where is it? How're we gonna get there if we don't know
the way?

text_block_list.name: Mystic Granny
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Well, let me provide you with a vague and mysterious clue.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No! Gimme a straight answer! I've had enough of the riddles!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I know something that may come in handy.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Umamusume Skill—Pace Up!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
A summary is in store! Somehow or another, our party of heroes
manage to pinpoint the location of the Uma Lord's castle.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
They advance! And they arrive! There at the castle, they will finally
face off against the menacing Uma Lord! Summary finished!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whoa, that Pace Up skill was super effective!

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Huhhh?! You're here already? I didn't even have time to put on my
cape!

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
What happened to that Super Golshi Ogre EX that I cunningly
positioned in your path?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Didn't see it. We took a shortcut.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You must have had your fill of fun by now, Golshi. It's time to stop the
games.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: With this bolt of lightning, you will be sent back to our home world!

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Huh, what's that crazy holy aura? Did you evolve into an Uma Angel
or something?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Divine judgment, come down and cleanse this world! Angelic Bolt!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ooohhh! There it is, the ultimate spell to conquer the Uma Lord! Time
for the credits to roll!

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? So much for bein' a cleric! A little tickle like that couldn't
fix a cramp, let alone the game!

text_block_list.name: Mercenary Machos
text_block_list.text: What the?! It had no effect?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I knew it...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass! Qué pasó? Why didn't your spell work? Was the legend
wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I had a feeling this might happen. Something about the phrasing has
been eating at me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
"With innate, thunderous power, she will deliver unto the demon lord
a strike of destruction and felicity alike." It calls the power "innate",
right? And it supposedly brings both destruction and felicity.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Magic power isn't something innate to Umamusume. If we were meant
to defeat the Uma Lord, perhaps it wouldn't be through a spell.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm not followin' you too well, but... what's clear is defeatin' her won't
be as simple as we thought.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: In which case, let's give this fantasy story a classic fantasy endin'!

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Oh? What kind? A battle between our pet summons? A cook-off with
the random ingredients clogging our inventories?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Nah, it's not a real RPG without some fist-on-fist action! Bring it on,
Uma Lord! Try wrestling your way through a sixty-minute singles
match with yours truly!

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Oh! So that's how it is? Two can play at that game! Forget
wrestling—it's not a JRPG without a collectible card minigame!

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Take thaaaat!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Aaagh, I'm done for! That limited edition Mil Masterio slammer got
me good!

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Another win for Team Golshi! I knew my first edition Umandam cards
wouldn't let me down! People slept on them after the show was
canceled, but they're super strong!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El! Are you really going to waste our time playing that silly game?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I mean, I had to give it a go! It looked so much fun...

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Well, if cards aren't cutting it for you, let's settle this like true
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
What better contest is there than a race? With my Uma Lord powers,
conjuring up a course will be an easy-peasy piece of cupcake!

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Welcome to Toky—I mean... Demonkyo Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh! Just like that and we're practically at the real Tokyo
Racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
All right, El, Grass! Bet you can't complain if we settle this fair and
mostly square on the fantasy track!

text_block_list.name: Uma Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: Just wait until you see my demon dash!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oooh, now that's what I'm talkin' about! Brawler's physically the strongest class in Uma Quest. I can't lose!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, all right. But please, El, don't let your guard down.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? What's wrong, Grass? The look on your face is freakin' me out.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You heard what Golshi said just now. She's going to fight "fair and mostly square".

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
This isn't the real Tokyo. We're still in Umanest, a virtual kingdom of
swords and spells.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We're about to run in a fantasy race—where blades will clash and
spells will soar!
